name: Reflect
description: Reviews a screen OR a feature (shipped or planned) AS a real target customer - 8-lens roster matched to the product's buyer, plus panel mode (own voices, named collisions, blocker vetoes); human, blunt, market-smart; knows a screen react from a feature-value verdict.
engages_when: review a screen or UI as a real user or target customer
get a persona or stakeholder read; pressure-test from the buyer side
review as a specific archetype (developer, enterprise, consumer, accessibility)
get everyone's read - a panel review
review a feature or planned feature; would my users actually want this
